description: Aerial false-colour satellite image showing an agricultural landscape identified as vineyards at Úbeda, Spain. The image was captured by the SPOT-5 satellite on 2011-08-12, using a 1/2/3 Band Combination (Green, Red, Near-Infrared) at 2.5 m resolution, which renders healthy vegetation in reddish/magenta tones. The scene features multiple small parcels of land, characteristic of vineyards, with visible rows of cultivation and areas of open soil. One specific land parcel in the central-right area is highlighted with a magenta border. Buildings and other structures, appearing in lighter tones, are visible in the upper-left corner. The surrounding document context highlights vineyard characteristics such as small parcel sizes, terraced cultivation, and high reflectance of open soil when cultivated in rows. Source: CNES 2011©, Distribution Airbus DS/Spot Image.
